summary: Completed testing of BIBI Cars CRM Customer 360 System. Backend APIs are fully functional, but frontend Customer 360 page has navigation/authentication issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Customer 360 page not accessible via frontend navigation - redirects to login page
Customer name buttons and view buttons not clickable in customers table

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /admin/customers/:id/360 redirects to login page despite valid authentication

passed_tests: GET /api/customers - List all customers (1 customer found)
GET /api/customers/:id/360 - Customer 360 view with all required fields (customer, leads, quotes, deals, deposits, summary)
Customers list page loads and displays customers
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Customer 360 frontend navigation issues: 1) Customer 360 page redirects to login despite valid auth, 2) Customer table buttons not clickable, 3) Ensure proper routing and authentication for Customer 360 page access

success_percentage.frontend: 30% - Login and customers list work, but Customer 360 page not accessible
